step_0.prompt: Let's sort this out! 🔍 First: have you been able to insert coins at the central display to start the dryer?

pay_help.prompt:
No problem! Here's how to pay:
💶 Insert coins at the central display:
• €3 = 15 min
• €4 = 20 min
• €5 = 25 min

Once the time appears on the display, press PAUSE to confirm and start.

pay_retry.prompt: Were you able to insert the coins and see time on the display? (yes / no)

display_check.prompt:
Good — now, what does the display show?

1️⃣ A price in € (e.g. 3.00, 4.00, 5.00) — need more coins
2️⃣ Minutes of drying time
3️⃣ DOOR
4️⃣ FILTRO / filter alarm
5️⃣ FALLO / fault alarm
6️⃣ Display is off
display_check.onInterruptFallback: Please reply with a number (1–6) to indicate what the display shows.

check_credit.prompt:
The display shows the price 💶 You need to add more coins:
• €3 = 15 min  •  €4 = 20 min  •  €5 = 25 min

Insert the remaining amount, then press PAUSE to confirm.

check_credit_result.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

check_start_btn.prompt: Your credit is accepted ✅ Press the PAUSE button to confirm your time and start the dryer.

check_start_result.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

door_close.prompt: DOOR means the door is not properly closed 🚪 Open it and close it firmly until you hear a click.

door_check.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

filter_alarm.prompt: The filter door alarm is active ⚠️ Press STOP once to reset it, then close the filter door properly and try again.

filter_check.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

fallo_alarm.prompt: There is a FALLO alarm (rotation or aspiration fault) ⚠️ Press STOP once to reset it and try again.

fallo_check.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

no_power.prompt: The display is off — this may be a power supply issue 🔌 I'm notifying the operator to check the machine.

escalate_pay.prompt: I'm notifying the operator to help with the payment issue 🙌

escalate.prompt: No worries — I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will check the dryer and assist you shortly.

escalate_filter.prompt: The filter alarm persists ⚠️ I'm notifying the operator — please avoid using this machine for now.

escalate_fallo.prompt: The fault alarm persists ⚠️ I'm notifying the operator — please do not use this machine.

ok.prompt: The dryer has started! ✅ Enjoy your drying cycle. If you need anything else, I'm here 😊

step_0.prompt:
I'm sorry to hear there's an issue 😔 What happened after the drying cycle?

1️⃣ Clothes still damp / not fully dried
2️⃣ Burnt smell or marks on clothes
3️⃣ Stains on clothes
4️⃣ Unpleasant smell
5️⃣ Door locked after cycle ended
step_0.onInterruptFallback: Please reply with a number (1–5) to describe what happened.

damp.prompt: Was the laundry soaking wet when you took it from the washer (spin cycle may have failed)? (yes / no)

damp_washer.prompt:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Never put soaking wet clothes in the dryer — it damages the filter.

If the washer's spin cycle failed (END+bAL), a re-wash in 2 separate machines may be needed. I'm notifying the operator to assess the situation and any possible compensation.

damp_overload.prompt: The dryer may have been overloaded or the cycle time was insufficient. I'm notifying the operator to assess whether a re-dry is possible.

burnt.prompt: Was there plastic material, coins, or any foreign object in the drum? (yes / no)

burnt_plastic.prompt: Burns caused by foreign objects in the drum are the customer's responsibility. I'm notifying the operator to assess the case — no automatic compensation is guaranteed.

burnt_normal.prompt: I'm sorry about your clothes 😔 I'm notifying the operator to assess the damage. No automatic compensation is guaranteed — each case is evaluated individually.

stain.prompt: I'm sorry about the stains 😔 I'm notifying the operator. They will assess whether a re-wash compensation applies.

smell.prompt: I'm notifying the operator about the unpleasant smell 🔧 They will check the machine and assess your case.

door_locked.prompt: After the cycle ends, the door stays locked for about 2 minutes during the cooling phase 🌬️ Please wait a moment and try again.

door_locked_check.prompt: Has the door opened now? (yes / no)

escalate_door.prompt: The door is still locked 🔒 I'm notifying the operator to assist you.

escalate.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will assist you shortly.

ok_post.prompt: Great! ✅ Glad it's resolved. If you need anything else, I'm here 😊
